semantic.role: Configuration schema and default resolver for the file scanning policy used in the pipeline. This module defines the contract that controls which files are scanned (source, ignore chain, protocol inclusions/exclusions) and how partial overrides are merged with defaults.
responsibilities: Define the FileSource type to select the set of files for scanning (git-tracked, git-tracked-plus-untracked, or full filesystem).
Define the ScanPolicy interface specifying file source, ignore chain (with inheritGitIgnore, projectIgnore, localIgnore), and protocol-level inclusion/exclusion lists.
Define the PartialScanPolicy interface allowing callers to override only specific fields of ScanPolicy.
Implement resolveScanPolicy to merge a partial policy with default values, producing a complete ScanPolicy.
Maintain protocol-level isolation: the policy definition must not depend on CLI or filesystem I/O.
outOfScope: Does not perform actual file scanning or traversal.
Does not interact with the filesystem or Git repository.
Does not parse CLI arguments or configuration files.
Does not manage scan results or state.
invariants: Must not import from CLI layer (core-pipeline-isolation rule).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, isolated configuration type for scan policies that can be consumed by engines, services, and tasks without coupling to I/O or CLI concerns.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected; the file remains stable with unchanged contracts.

publicSurface.description: Union type that selects the source of files for scanning: 'git-tracked', 'git-tracked-plus-untracked', or 'filesystem'. Used by scan engines to determine which files to process.
Complete interface specifying file source, ignore chain configuration, and protocol-level inclusion/exclusion arrays. Consumed by scanners and pipeline stages to control scan scope.
Partial version of ScanPolicy with all fields optional. Allows callers to override only specific policy fields without specifying the full policy.
Merges a PartialScanPolicy with default values to produce a complete ScanPolicy. Called by pipeline initialization and command handlers to compute the effective scan policy.
